mapper.select:
select community_no, community_title, community_content, community_writer, to_char(community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as community_date, view_count, member_thumb, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl l where c.community_no = l.community_no) as like_count, (select count(*) from community_dislike_tbl d where c.community_no = d.community_no) as dislike_count, (select count(*) from community_report_tbl r where c.community_no = r.community_no) as report_count from community_tbl c join member_tbl on (community_writer = member_id) where community_status = 1
and community_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' or community_content like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and community_writer = #{searchKeyword}
order by community_no desc
order by community_no asc
order by view_count desc
order by like_count desc
order by dislike_count desc
order by report_count desc
offset #{page}*#{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
select community_no, community_title, community_content, community_writer, to_char(community_date,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') community_date from community_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo}
